MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT T Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication On Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-11-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances by ZOOM Video-conferencing:
Attorney, Roger L Sisneros (Email: roger@sgllplaw.com) of the law offices of Sisneros Graziani LLP (Tel: 415.367.3679) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorney, Ferederick P. (Rick) Sheinfeld (Email: rick.sheinfield@sfcityatty.org) of the San Francisco City Attorney's Office (Tel: 415.554.3872) appears as counsel for defendant/moving party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides, on record as reflected in the notes of the certified shorthand reporter.

The Court issues a partial tentative ruling to grant as to general negligence.

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENTT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication On Plaintiffs Complaint is TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION by Judge Richard B. Ulmer on December 11, 2020.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com.

***

After the hearing the court signs a written order. The City's Motion for Summary Judgment/Adjudication is in part GRANTED and in part DENIED per written order filed Dec-11-2020.
